nexus_prime.name: Nexus Prime (Capital)
nexus_prime.description: A floating megacity, the control center of the planetary Aether Network.

aethel_spires.name: Spires of Aethel (City)
aethel_spires.description: A complex of floating laboratories where new lifeforms are engineered.

arcanum_archive.name: Grand Archive of Arcanum (City)
arcanum_archive.description: The repository of all world knowledge, maintained by millions of constructs.

sky_harbor.name: Sky Harbor (City)
sky_harbor.description: The main trading hub for giant transport Aerowhales.

bio_forge.name: Bio-Forge (Citadel)
bio_forge.description: A massive industrial complex for producing combat organisms.

solar_citadel.name: Solar Citadel (City)
solar_citadel.description: A complex of mirrors and lenses harvesting stellar energy for shields.

whispering_gardens.name: Whispering Gardens (Forest)
whispering_gardens.description: A perfectly engineered biome where plants sing in unison with the Aether.

obsidian_wall.name: Obsidian Wall (Fort)
obsidian_wall.description: An impenetrable barrier protecting the central regions from wild zones.

deep_sea_obs.name: Deep-Sea Observatory (Settlement)
deep_sea_obs.description: An underwater dome for studying oceanic mana currents.

resonance_pits.name: Resonance Pits (Mountains)
resonance_pits.description: Mines where the purest quartz is extracted using acoustic waves.

cloud_piercer.name: Cloud-Piercer Academy (Citadel)
cloud_piercer.description: Training grounds for elite Reality Weavers and Synchronizers.

silver_conduits.name: Silver Conduits (Haven)
silver_conduits.description: A distribution hub for liquid ether across the continent.

void_bastion.name: Void Bastion (Fort)
void_bastion.description: An outpost of the Border Guards monitoring rifts in reality.

genesis_craters.name: Genesis Craters (Plains)
genesis_craters.description: Proving grounds for terraforming and testing new ecosystems.
